data.title: Bitcoin is aiming for a $116,000-$118,000 recovery within 2 weeks, with support at $108,600. Oversold but hopeful.
data.description: Bitcoin price is expected to potentially bounce back to a range between $116,000 and $118,000 despite being oversold at the moment. The critical support level remains at $108,600.

data.title: SWBC Real Estate starts construction on luxury apartments in Dallas; The Royalton at Mercer Crossing.
data.description: A high-end multi-family community, The Royalton at Mercer Crossing, is being developed by SWBC Real Estate in the Dallas/Fort Worth region. The project has officially commenced with the groundbreaking ceremony in San Antonio and Dallas. The development marks a significant investment in the area's real estate sector, catering to the growing demand for luxury housing.

data.title: DIAGNOS reports voting results of shareholders meeting on Sept 25, 2025. TSX Venture: ADK, OTCQB: DGNOF, FWB: 4D4A.
data.description: BROSSARD, Quebec - On September 25, 2025, DIAGNOS Inc. disclosed the outcomes of the shareholders' annual meeting. The corporation, known for its expertise in AI-driven early health issue detection, is listed on TSX Venture (ADK), OTCQB (DGNOF), and FWB (4D4A). Today's meeting revealed the voting statistics, indicating investors' decisions on key matters affecting the company's operations and future direction.

data.title: Sunrise receives $0.59M grant for graphite and carbon materials innovation from National Science and Technology Development Fund.
data.description: Sunrise New Energy Co., Ltd., a prominent manufacturer of battery anode materials, based in ZIBO, China, disclosed that it has received a grant of about RMB 4.3 million (equivalent to USD 0.59 million) through the National Science and Technology Development Fund on September 25, 2025. This grant illustrates the company's commitment to innovation and advancement in the industry, as it continues to lead in this sector.

data.title: Global Programmable Oscillator Market expected to reach USD 4.8 billion by 2034 at 7.7% CAGR. Driven by 5G, IoT, automotive trends. MEMS tech in focus.
data.description: Custom Market Insights has released a report on the Programmable Oscillator Market, stating that its value is projected to reach around USD 4.8 Billion by 2034, with a compound annual growth rate of about 7.7% from 2025 to 2034. The market was valued at approximately USD 2.3 Billion in 2024 and is expected to reach USD 2.5 Billion in 2025. Key drivers of market growth include the rapid expansion of 5G networks, increasing adoption of IoT and consumer electronics, automotive electronics, and a shift towards MEMS-based technologies. The demand for reliable timing solutions in various industries is leading to increased adoption of programmable oscillators. With competitive pricing and market dynamics favoring MEMS-based solutions, the global industry outlook seems positive.

data.title: DoubleLine briefing discusses challenges faced by BLS in producing accurate employment figures due to declining survey participation.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on September 25, 2025, a briefing held by Ryan Kimmel, the DoubleLine Fixed Income Allocation Strategist, highlighted the increasing hurdles encountered by the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics in generating precise monthly employment data due to a reduction in survey involvement. This issue has raised concerns regarding the reliability of the employment figures.

data.title: F.N.B. Corp (NYSE: FNB) to release Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 16, 2025, post-market. Vincent J. Delie Jr. to lead the report.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 25, 2025, F.N.B. Corporation (NYSE: FNB) revealed intentions to disclose their financial performance for the third quarter of 2025 following the market closure on Thursday, October 16, 2025. Vincent J. Delie, Jr., who serves as the Chairman, President, and Chief Executive Officer, will be overseeing the announcement.

data.title: Entergy donates $3M to support customers Beat the Heat with energy bill assistance, keeping vulnerable customers safe.
data.description: Entergy has provided aid to vulnerable customers to keep them safe and cool during the scorching summer months in New Orleans. As of September 25, 2025, the company's efforts include offering energy bill assistance and essential resources. Shareholders, customers, and employees joined forces in response to the soaring temperatures, with the initiative making a significant impact. The valuable assistance has ensured the well-being of individuals in need, with a substantial number benefitting from this support.

data.title: Ethereum and Solana sentiment turns bearish as prices fall on Myriad. Stay tuned for PENGU culture coin developments.
data.description: This week, the top markets on Myriad are buzzing with price predictions for Ethereum and Solana. Investors are keeping a close eye on Ethereum, with experts forecasting a potential surge in its value. Similarly, there is significant interest in Solana, as traders anticipate a bullish trend for this cryptocurrency. In addition, the focus is on the Pudgy Penguins culture coin, PENGU, with speculations about its next milestone. Stay updated with the latest market insights and trends on Myriad's platform.

data.title: Steward Partners selected for 'RIA Firms to Watch in 2026' by AdvisorHub due to ownership structure & growth.
data.description: AdvisorHub recently highlighted the impactful ownership structure and growth trajectory of Steward Partners, characterizing them as influential elements that are shaping the future of Registered Investment Advisors (RIAs). The company, headquartered in Stamford, Connecticut, has shown significant growth momentum, embodying innovation in its employee-owned model. As of September 25, 2025, Steward Partners stands out as an independent financial services firm that specializes in offering holistic wealth management solutions.

data.title: Trident appoints Jim Haney as CFO, bringing 15 years of experience in defense sector.
data.description: Trident Solutions, a growing multi-domain defense electronics platform supported by ATL Partners, has appointed Jim Haney as its Chief Financial Officer. With over 15 years of financial leadership in the defense and aerospace industry, Haney previously held the position of CFO at Teledyne Qioptiq Group, a segment of Teledyne Technologies. This move comes after the acquisition of Teledyne Qioptiq Group from Excelitas Technologies in January. Haney's diverse experience makes him a valuable addition to Trident's leadership team.
